[Home](https://www.banners.com/home) 2. [Custom Banners](https://www.banners.com/banners) 3. Standard Size Banners # Standard Size Banners ### The Perfect Banner For Any Job ![Cardinal Standard size banner](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/sliderImages/Cardinal Standard size banner.jpg) * [Product Overview](#0ee3cb1d-76a6-4d33-835b-1ceed7da8dbc) * [Material Options](#a57867a9-3903-4dc2-864d-2570c0141769) * [Finishing Options](#1213f0da-2575-4658-aa75-a0eea431426a) * [Artwork Specs](#39df3532-3691-41a5-bc2e-e1a031198a7c) * [Production Times](#4b878afa-225d-4a42-b26c-52c8a29051e7) * [Payment Options](#8e3256d5-9b10-4132-8195-84d47b382754) * [Shipping Guidelines](#506dc1fc-9fb8-4247-8c1f-8b31372dcaa7) [Vinyl banners](https://www.banners.com/types-of-banners-material-comparison) are printed on high-quality 13oz scrim vinyl banner material. The scrim vinyl is a woven fiber inside the material that gives the banner extra strength. You can use banners indoor and outdoor for many different occasions. Vinyl banners are digitally-printed in full color. You can select one of our banner templates to customize in the online designer with backgrounds, clip-art and text. You can also upload your own images. **Did we answer all your questions?** If not, please give us a call at [(320) 391-5300](tel:13203915300), and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you. Looking for something more specific? [We can customize your order through a custom quote](https://www.banners.com/quotes)! Ideal for special projects, unique sizes, and larger quantity orders. #### Six Customizable Banner Materials Your banner is made with the finest materials available and printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that pop. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA. Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please ask your customer service representative to discuss your specific application. **13 oz Matte Vinyl Banners** Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular banner material. It has a low shine and rich color gamut. **13 oz Gloss Vinyl Banners** Our high-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl banner material has a high shine to it that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics to give it a high-end look. **18 oz Vinyl Banners** Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality. **Mesh Banners** Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim that allows a 37% airflow. Mesh banners are ideal for outdoor and windy conditions. **Fabric Banners** Made with a premium nylon/polyester blend material called Banner Soft. This fabric is ideal for indoor displays and has a low shine that produces a high-end look and feel. **Adhesive Banners** Standard Tack Vinyl: Standard tack vinyl can be used both indoors and outdoors, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained. Extreme Tack Vinyl: Extreme Tack vinyl is white calendered vinyl material with a high tack adhesive that is specifically designed to adhere to low energy surfaces. #### Standard Size Banner Finishing Options **Hems & Grommets** **Reinforced Hems** *
